languages.text: "Сделка с ксеносом мне не по нутру еще больше, чем ты".
"Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
languages.original_text: "Сделка с ксеносом мне не по нутру еще больше, чем ты".

traits.locale_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
"Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
"Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
"Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
"Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

languages.text: “跟异形做交易，比跟你做交易更让我难受。”
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: “跟异形做交易，比跟你做交易更让我难受。”

languages.text: «Tratar con un xenos me sentaría aún peor que tratar con usted».
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: «Tratar con un xenos me sentaría aún peor que tratar con usted».

languages.text: « Avoir affaire à un xénos, c'est encore pire que d'avoir affaire à vous. »
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: « Avoir affaire à un xénos, c'est encore pire que d'avoir affaire à vous. »

languages.text: "Bir zenoyla anlaşmak, seninle anlaşmaktan bile daha çok midemi bulandırıyor."
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: "Bir zenoyla anlaşmak, seninle anlaşmaktan bile daha çok midemi bulandırıyor."

languages.text: "Mich mit einem Xenos anzulegen, schmeckt mir noch weniger, als mich mit Euch anzulegen."
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: "Mich mit einem Xenos anzulegen, schmeckt mir noch weniger, als mich mit Euch anzulegen."

languages.text: 「異種族との付き合いは、君たちとの付き合いよりも嫌だ」
languages.original_text: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族との付き合いは、君たちとの付き合いよりも嫌だ」
